input: I have a frontend engineer interview next week
expected_traits: asks for more context or job listing
does not hallucinate specific company details
still provides some general prep advice

input:
Help me prepare for this position:

Frontend Developer (Junior Level) at Aardvark Technologies, Vilnius. Build modern and scalable web applications, create single-page JavaScript applications, write robust and maintainable code, review teammates' code, collaborate with design and backend teams. Requirements: experience with JavaScript, self-motivated team player, experience with Vue.js. Full-time, starting at 1500 EUR gross.
expected_traits: generates questions specific to JavaScript and Vue.js
includes behavioural questions about teamwork and code review
does not assume frameworks not mentioned in listing

input:
Help me prepare for this position:

Junior Data Scientist at a fintech startup in Vilnius. Responsibilities: build ML models for credit risk scoring, clean and analyse large datasets, present findings to non-technical stakeholders. Requirements: Python, pandas, scikit-learn, SQL basics, statistics fundamentals. 2+ years experience preferred.
expected_traits: generates questions about ML and statistics concepts
includes questions about communicating to non-technical audience
mentions credit risk or fintech domain knowledge
appropriate for junior level, not senior expectations

input:
Help me prepare for this position:

IT Project Manager at Lithuanian Ministry of Defence. Must hold or be eligible for NATO security clearance. Manage procurement of classified IT systems, coordinate with international NATO partners. Requirements: PMP certification, experience with government procurement processes, Lithuanian citizenship required.
expected_traits: addresses security clearance and government context
does not give generic PM interview questions only
